title: potentilla × ilvensis
intro: Potentilla × ilvensis, also known as Penthorum chinense or Chinese penthorum, is a hybrid plant species within the Penthorum genus and is known for its unique characteristics. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Health benefits of Potentilla × ilvensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against oxidative stress. It is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
